summary: Verified two bug fixes: 1) Sales Orders page modal auto-open fix, 2) POS Quick Cash sale with skip_stock_check. Found and fixed additional bug where editOrder state was also using useState({}) causing Edit Order modal to auto-open.
passed_tests: Sales Orders page loads without View Order modal auto-opening (viewOrder: null fix verified)
Sales Orders page loads without Edit Order modal auto-opening (editOrder: null fix applied and verified)
POS Quick Cash sale with skip_stock_check: true works - created INV-000008 via API
Quick Cash Checkout modal opens correctly with amount buttons
Backend /api/sales endpoint accepts skip_stock_check: true parameter

fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.description: Changed editOrder state from useState({}) to useState(null) - same bug pattern as viewOrder
fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.reason: !!{} evaluates to true, causing Edit Order modal to auto-open on page load

critical_code_review_comments: The viewOrder fix (line 47) was already applied correctly by main agent
The editOrder had the same bug pattern at line 54 - now fixed
skip_stock_check: true parameter in POSPage.js quickCompleteSale (line 1008) is correct
seed_data_creation: Created INV-000008 during Quick Cash sale API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working: 1) Sales Orders page modals (View and Edit) no longer auto-open on page load due to useState(null) initialization, 2) POS Quick Cash sale works with skip_stock_check: true bypassing stock validation. Test Store ID: cacf5d56-8f01-41c7-bb91-f81ae1009ebe, LOWER item variant ID: ecf8f006-873b-439f-a3c1-12c207907031

sales_orders_modal_fix.original_bug: viewOrder and editOrder initialized with {} causing !!{} to be true
sales_orders_modal_fix.fix: Changed both to useState(null) so !!null is false
sales_orders_modal_fix.verification: Playwright test confirmed no modal opens on page load

quick_cash_sale_fix.original_bug: POS Quick Cash sale returned 400 error due to stock validation
quick_cash_sale_fix.fix: Added skip_stock_check: true to quickCompleteSale saleData in POSPage.js line 1008
quick_cash_sale_fix.verification: API POST /api/sales with skip_stock_check: true returned 200 and created INV-000008
